Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "FLIPANDFLOP-07E2-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $07e2 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Flip and Flop (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Put some init code at $07E2 to set a magic value of $64 at $02A7 before starting the game.
